Progressive_NoObstacleTooBig.description: Kill 50 enemies through obstacles. No one in the Zone is really safe.

Progressive_Demoman.name: BOOM!
Progressive_Demoman.description: 20 enemies killed by blowing up the surroundings. Save on hand grenades and enjoy the fireworks.

UseDifferentWeapons.name: Personal approach
UseDifferentWeapons.description: One fight, four enemies, killed by different weapons. That trick would charm the hell out of Mavka!

LonerShooter.name: Loner shooter
LonerShooter.description: Shoot an enemy in the head from 75 meters. No scope-peeking!

MerryGoRound.name: Merry-go-round
MerryGoRound.description: Drop a corpse into the Whirlgig anomaly. A joy for someone who never got to ride the Ferris Wheel.

DrunkMaster.name: Keeping your hands steady
DrunkMaster.description: Shoot an enemy in the head, through an obstacle, having the intoxication effect.

CatchingUp.name: Catching up
CatchingUp.description: Shoot an incoming grenade to make it explode. Nice view!

BlueHoarder.name: Flash Royal
BlueHoarder.description: Gather all armor and gear enhancement flash drives.

WipedOut.name: Wiped out
WipedOut.description: Kill a Rodent using a grenade launcher. A good wipe-out makes the Duty proud.

CanOpener.name: Can opener
CanOpener.description: Use a knife to kill an enemy wearing an exoskeleton. Epic battle indeed.

Progressive_CouponsToBurn.name: Coupons to burn
Progressive_CouponsToBurn.description: Spend over 1,000,000 coupons. Myklukha and Sidorovich will fight hard over their favorite customer.

Bouncy.name: Bouncy
Bouncy.description: A successful jump from a 30-meter height. No parachute, though.

ChimeraRun.name: Run, stalker, run!
ChimeraRun.description: That Chimera made you run like an Olympic champion!

SneakyClearLair.name: Peace and quiet
SneakyClearLair.description: Kill everyone in the camp before the alarm is set off. They couldn't see it coming!

FinishSquad.name: Proxy
FinishSquad.description: Kill a squad that just finished off another squad and won the fight. Or so they thought…

Lockpick.name: Lockpick
Lockpick.description: Lure a mutant into an anomaly. Hardly a noble deed, but it gets the job done.

HelloZone.name: Welcome to the Zone
HelloZone.description: Prologue complete, but this is so far from over.

GoodbyeLesserZone.name: Good hunting, stalker
GoodbyeLesserZone.description: Leave the Lesser Zone to go Scanner-hunting. More miracles await, and more dangers, too.

MainPrize.name: Eyes on the prize
MainPrize.description: Retrieve the stolen Scanner. Time to find out what is so special about it.

CrystalLock.name: House of glass
CrystalLock.description: Witness the temple of science get destroyed.

KillFaust.name: Such is the will of the Monolith

OSoznanie.name: I see you have many questions
OSoznanie.description: Meet the C-Consciousness Representative. Didn't Strelok finish them off?

DoctorMystery.name: Doctor's oath
DoctorMystery.description: The mysterious Doctor had to reveal what he'd been hiding.

MeetStrelok.name: Living legend
MeetStrelok.description: Meet Strelok. How was it, talking to a living legend?

MeetDegtyarev.name: The Prypiat guardian
MeetDegtyarev.description: Meet Degtyarev in Prypiat. The toughest place in the Zone has the toughest-looking watchman.

EndingKorshunov.name: Brave new world
EndingKorshunov.description: Korshunov sacrificed himself so that humanity could have a new future, free of doubt and the Zone.

EndingShram.name: Today never ends
EndingShram.description: Scar went into the pod to rid the Zone of darkness.

EndingStrelok.name: She will never be free
EndingStrelok.description: Strelok went into the pod to protect her. Always.

EndingKaymanov.name: Project Y
EndingKaymanov.description: Go through with Kaimanov's initial plan.

SaveChernozem.name: Wardens drool
SaveChernozem.description: Save a bandit's life, get on the Ward's naughty list. Was it worth it?

TheSmartest.name: Stalker's smarts
TheSmartest.description: Find a way to get the parts without sneaking into the warehouse.

SaveSkadovsk.name: The good ol' days
SaveSkadovsk.description: Help Skadovsk get its name and rightful owners back.

ShootApples.name: Apple-shot
ShootApples.description: Three precise shots at apples spared stalker lives and helped you win a twisted bandit's game.

SaveZalesie.name: Baptism by fire
SaveZalesie.description: Help Zalissya survive the Monolith attack. New generations of stalkers will have a place to stay.

Povodok.name: On a leash
Povodok.description: The Leash project experiments are finally over. Hopefully.

VerySpecialWeapon.name: Your move!
VerySpecialWeapon.description: Found a unique weapon designed for a kingpin. Checkmate!

SitNearBonfire.name: Goss
SitNearBonfire.description: Join Stalkers for some campfire gossip.

AcceptFaustHelp.name: One awkward step
AcceptFaustHelp.description: I am blind, but it's you who cannot see.

DeclineFaustHelp.name: Monolith envoy
DeclineFaustHelp.description: You know more than I do, envoy.

FindAllScanners.name: Scanning complete
FindAllScanners.description: You were out looking for a scanner, but ended up collecting them all.

BG3_Quest01.name: Descent From Avernus
BG3_Quest01.description: Take control of the nautiloid and escape the Hells.

BG3_Quest02.name: The Plot Thickens
BG3_Quest02.description: Leave Act I - for somewhere altogether darker.

BG3_Quest03.name: The City Awaits
BG3_Quest03.description: Leave Act II - Baldur's Gate is just over the horizon.

BG3_Quest04.name: All's Well That Ends Well
BG3_Quest04.description: Finish the game (with a heartfelt 'thank you!' from Larian Studios).

BG3_Quest05.name: Absolute Power Corrupts
BG3_Quest05.description: Reign with terror: take control of the Netherbrain and bend the world to your will.

BG3_Quest06.name: Hero of the Forgotten Realms
BG3_Quest06.description: Save the realms: destroy the Absolute once and for all.

BG3_Quest07.name: Sins of the Father
BG3_Quest07.description: Claim your Throne of Blood: take control of the Netherbrain for Bhaal and break the world.

BG3_Quest08.name: Ceremorphosis
BG3_Quest08.description: Make the ultimate sacrifice: become a mind flayer to defeat the Netherbrain.

BG3_Quest09.name: Roleplayer
BG3_Quest09.description: Complete ten background goals in a single playthrough - you are one with your character.

BG3_Quest10.name: Bedrolls and Breakfast
BG3_Quest10.description: Take four full Long Rests in a single playthrough - adventuring's tiring work.

BG3_Quest11.name: Expand Your Mind
BG3_Quest11.description: Consume a parasite and unlock a new power - is it meant to wriggle the whole way down?

BG3_Quest12.name: Dig for Victory
BG3_Quest12.description: Dig up five buried chests in a single playthrough - treasure!

BG3_Quest13.name: No Penny Required
BG3_Quest13.description: Successfully use Detect Thoughts to pry into someone's thoughts.

BG3_Quest14.name: Escapologist
BG3_Quest14.description: Break out of prison after being arrested - aren't you daring?

BG3_Quest15.name: Outsourcing
BG3_Quest15.description: Recruit a hireling. You can befriend them or use them as cannon-fodder - we won't judge.

BG3_Quest16.name: Jack-of-all-Trades
BG3_Quest16.description: Multiclass into every class in one playthrough without asking Withers to change your character.

BG3_Quest17.name: Homebrewer
BG3_Quest17.description: Create three unique alchemical solutions in a single playthrough - bottoms up!

BG3_Quest18.name: You Have Two Hands for a Reason
BG3_Quest18.description: Pet Scratch and the owlbear cub at the same time - the greatest joy an adventurer could ask for.

BG3_Quest19.name: Rude, Crude, and Full of Attitude
BG3_Quest19.description: Find and summon the quasit Shovel. Or is her name... Fork? Maybe Basket?

BG3_Quest20.name: Forged in Blood and Fire
BG3_Quest20.description: Craft an item in the Adamantine Forge.

BG3_Quest21.name: Under Lock and Key
BG3_Quest21.description: Rescue all the prisoners from the depths of Moonrise Towers in one playthrough.

BG3_Quest22.name: She Cannot Be Caged!
BG3_Quest22.description: Rescue Sazza from the Emerald Grove, Goblin Camp, and Moonrise Towers in one playthrough.

BG3_Quest23.name: Taking Blood
BG3_Quest23.description: Steal the Blood of Lathander from underneath Rosymorn Monastery.

BG3_Quest24.name: Leave No One Behind
BG3_Quest24.description: Save every tiefling refugee you can throughout the game in a single playthrough.

BG3_Quest25.name: Murder in Baldur's Gate
BG3_Quest25.description: Coat the streets of Baldur's Gate in blood - become an Unholy Assassin of Bhaal.

BG3_Quest27.name: Kill Two Birds With One Gnome
BG3_Quest27.description: Use one enemy as an improvised weapon against another.

BG3_Quest28.name: Busker
BG3_Quest28.description: Earn a hundred gold from playing sweet, sweet music in a single playthrough.

BG3_Quest29.name: Action Surge
BG3_Quest29.description: Perform five attacks in one turn. Your enemies won't know what hit them (literally).

BG3_Quest30.name: Fists of Fury
BG3_Quest30.description: Kill a character with an Unarmed Strike.

BG3_Quest31.name: Devil's in the Details
BG3_Quest31.description: Defeat Commander Zhalk on the nautiloid.

BG3_Quest32.name: Pest Control
BG3_Quest32.description: Kill the Spider Matriarch before her eggs hatch - why do they have so many legs?

BG3_Quest33.name: A Grym Fate
BG3_Quest33.description: Kill the Adamantine Golem without using the Forge Hammer.

BG3_Quest34.name: Non-Invasive Procedure
BG3_Quest34.description: Kill the Surgeon before he performs surgery on you in combat.

BG3_Quest35.name: Penny Pincher
BG3_Quest35.description: Defeat the Toll Collector without her using gold against you - excellent budgeting.

BG3_Quest36.name: No Free Lunches
BG3_Quest36.description: Defeat the Apostle of Myrkul before it consumes any necromites.

BG3_Quest37.name: Fancy Footwork
BG3_Quest37.description: Defeat Gortash in Wyrm's Rock without activating any traps.

BG3_Quest38.name: First Blood
BG3_Quest38.description: Kill Orin while her cultists are performing their ritual chant.

BG3_Quest39.name: Interfectorem Draconis
BG3_Quest39.description: Kill the red dragon in the Upper City.

BG3_Quest40.name: Crash Landing
BG3_Quest40.description: In the Wyrmway, wait until the dragon is mid-flight, then knock it out of the sky - KAPOW.

BG3_Quest41.name: Bottoms Up
BG3_Quest41.description: Long Rest using only alcohol - a time-honoured dwarven tradition.

BG3_Quest42.name: Shove Off
BG3_Quest42.description: Kill a creature with falling damage.

BG3_Quest43.name: Bookworm
BG3_Quest43.description: Read 100 different books in a single playthrough. Adventuring isn't just daring quests, you know.

BG3_Quest44.name: Punch Drunk
BG3_Quest44.description: Defeat twenty opponents while drunk - down them.

BG3_Quest45.name: Fetch Quest
BG3_Quest45.description: Play fetch with Scratch - the best boy in the Realms.

BG3_Quest47.name: The Lich-Queen's Wrath
BG3_Quest47.description: Ally with Voss against the githyanki God-Queen. Good luck.

BG3_Quest48.name: To Bloom in Darkest Night
BG3_Quest48.description: Gift Shadowheart a night orchid - her favourite flower. Always knew she was a softie.

BG3_Quest49.name: Hot Date
BG3_Quest49.description: Go on a date with Karlach - now that's playing with fire.

BG3_Quest50.name: Just a Nibble
BG3_Quest50.description: Let Astarion bite you at night - ouch.

BG3_Quest52.name: Embrace Your Urge
BG3_Quest52.description: Become Bhaal's ultimate weapon - become his Slayer.

BG3_Quest53.name: Critical Hit
BG3_Quest53.description: Complete the game in Tactician mode.

BG3_Quest54.name: Foehammer
BG3_Quest54.description: Complete the game in Honour mode.

9.name: Our Promise
9.description: Complete the game on any difficulty.

10.name: The Right Man for the Job

11.name: Lunar Supremacy
11.description: Complete the game on Lunatic difficulty.

12.name: Small Talk
12.description: Talk to Diana in the Shelter.

13.name: Thanks for Everything!
13.description: Receive a picture as a present.

15.name: For Me?
15.description: Give an REM as a present.

19.description: Complete the main objective in every Training Sim.

21.name: You're Not Getting Away That Easy

25.description: Upgrade a weapon using Pure Lunum.

26.name: Can't Stop, Won't Stop
26.description: Print all obtainable weapons, hacking nodes, and abilities during the main story.

27.name: Cradle Surveyor
27.description: Reach 100% sector progress in a sector.

29.name: A Lunar Challenge
29.description: Complete a mission in a special sector.

30.name: Round 'Em Up
30.description: Defeat three enemies at the same time with the Lim Recycler.

31.name: Courage in Desperation
31.description: Repel the LunaDigger while progressing through the Lunum Mines.

32.name: Can I Borrow That?
32.description: Confuse a certain enemy and borrow its shield.

33.name: Clean Up on Aisle Three
33.description: Cleanse three or more enemies at the same time.

34.name: IT'S OVER 6000!
34.description: Deal 6000 gunshot damage in one second.

35.name: Who Needs Guns!?
35.description: Deal 3000 hacking damage in a single hack.

ACH_1.description: Complete Freeform Training in the Prologue.

ACH_2.description: Complete The Final Test in the Prologue.

ACH_5.description: Complete The Final Test unspotted. Kill only Jasper Knight, ensuring his body is not found.

ACH_7.name: Top of the Class
ACH_7.description: Beat the highest leaderboard score on a Contract.

ACH_9.description: Assassinate Targets with Ballistic, Accident and Explosion Kills.

ACH_10.name: Unseen Assassin
ACH_10.description: Assassinate a Target without getting spotted.

ACH_13.name: Death From Above
ACH_13.description: Complete On Top Of The World.

ACH_14.name: Dune Raider
ACH_14.description: Reveal all undiscovered areas in Dubai.

ACH_15.name: Treacherous Architecture
ACH_15.description: Kill Ingram with his oil-rig model, push Stuyvesant over a rail, and kill them in the air.

ACH_16.name: Keep Your Eyes Peeled
ACH_16.description: Make a target slip and fall while evacuating in a skydiving suit.

ACH_17.name: Rise Up
ACH_17.description: Complete all Mission Stories in On Top Of The World.

ACH_20.name: No Stone Unturned
ACH_20.description: Reveal all undiscovered areas in Dartmoor.

ACH_21.name: Upstairs, Downstairs
ACH_21.description: Eliminate Alexa in her private room, shoot her from the roof, and put her to rest.

ACH_23.name: Full House
ACH_23.description: Complete all Mission Stories in Death In The Family.

ACH_26.name: Followed the Trails
ACH_26.description: Reveal all undiscovered areas in Berlin.

ACH_27.name: Partied Out
ACH_27.description: Tremain has a rifle accident, Thames is hit by a crane and Montgomery & Banner light up the club.

ACH_29.name: Last Call
ACH_29.description: Become the club owner, and have a sit down with the ICA.

ACH_32.name: Surveillance Master
ACH_32.description: Reveal all undiscovered areas in Chongqing.

ACH_33.name: Future Shock
ACH_33.description: Kill Hush in his "relaxing chair," electrocute Royce and shoot both with one bullet.

ACH_34.name: Console Cowboy
ACH_34.description: Use Royce's terminal to fry the core.

ACH_35.name: Icebreaker
ACH_35.description: Complete all Mission Stories in End Of An Era.

ACH_38.name: Master the Terroir
ACH_38.description: Reveal all undiscovered areas in Mendoza.

ACH_39.name: Ripe for the Picking
ACH_39.description: Eliminate Vidal with the grape crusher, Yates with poisoned Grand Paladin, and both with gas.

ACH_41.name: Rich Harvest
ACH_41.description: Complete all Mission Stories in The Farewell.

ACH_44.name: Bullet Train
ACH_44.description: Take out a guard with a silenced pistol, with a shotgun and with an SMG.

ACH_48.name: Seven Figures
ACH_48.description: Get a score above 1,000,000 points on The Pen and the Sword.

ACH_49.name: Hawkeye
ACH_49.description: Complete The Pen and the Sword as Silent Assassin.

ACH_50.name: Pure Poetry
ACH_50.description: Complete all The Pen and the Sword Challenges.

ACH_53.name: In a League of Their Own
ACH_53.description: Get a score above 1,000,000 points on Crime and Punishment.

ACH_54.name: Never Knew What Hit Them
ACH_54.description: Complete Crime and Punishment as Silent Assassin.

ACH_55.name: Capital Punishment
ACH_55.description: Complete all Crime and Punishment Challenges.

ACH_69.name: Honorary Member
ACH_69.description: Reach Isle of Sgàil Mastery Level 20.

ACH_70.name: Silent Sniper
ACH_70.description: Complete The Last Yardbird as Silent Assassin.

ACH_77.name: Perfectionist
ACH_77.description: Complete Suit Only and Silent Assassin Challenges on The Icon, A House Built on Sand or Landslide.

BLESSED.name: Blessed
BLESSED.description: Acquire all Charms and receive Salubra's blessing

ZOTE.name: Rivalry
ZOTE.description: Defeat Zote in the Colosseum of Fools

AWAKENING.name: Awakening
AWAKENING.description: Collect 1800 Essence and awaken the Dream Nail

ASCENSION.name: Ascension
ASCENSION.description: Collect 2400 Essence and hear the Seer's final words

GRUBFRIEND.name: Grubfriend
GRUBFRIEND.description: Rescue half of the imprisoned grubs

METAMORPHOSIS.name: Metamorphosis
METAMORPHOSIS.description: Rescue all of the imprisoned grubs

NAILSMITH_KILL.name: Purity
NAILSMITH_KILL.description: Slay the Nailsmith with the Pure Nail

NAILSMITH_SPARE.name: Happy Couple
NAILSMITH_SPARE.description: Allow the Nailsmith to find a new calling

QUIRREL_EPILOGUE.name: Witness
QUIRREL_EPILOGUE.description: Spend a final moment with Quirrel

MOURNER.name: Solace
MOURNER.description: Bring peace to the Grey Mourner

STAG_STATION_HALF.name: Connection
STAG_STATION_HALF.description: Open half of Hallownest's Stag Stations

STAG_STATION_ALL.name: Hope
STAG_STATION_ALL.description: Open all of Hallownest's Stag Stations and discover the Stag Nest

MAP.name: Cartographer
MAP.description: Acquire a map of each area

COLOSSEUM_1.name: Warrior
COLOSSEUM_1.description: Complete the Trial of the Warrior

COLOSSEUM_2.name: Conqueror
COLOSSEUM_2.description: Complete the Trial of the Conqueror

COLOSSEUM_3.name: Fool
COLOSSEUM_3.description: Complete the Trial of the Fool

ENDING_A.name: The Hollow Knight
ENDING_A.description: Defeat the Hollow Knight and become the Vessel

ENDING_B.name: Sealed Siblings
ENDING_B.description: Defeat the Hollow Knight with Hornet by your side

ENDING_C.name: Dream No More
ENDING_C.description: Defeat the Radiance and consume the light

VOID.name: Void
VOID.description: Remember the past and unite the Abyss

SPEEDRUN_1.name: Speedrun 1
SPEEDRUN_1.description: Complete the game in under 10 hours

SPEEDRUN_2.name: Speedrun 2
SPEEDRUN_2.description: Complete the game in under 5 hours

COMPLETION.name: Completion
COMPLETION.description: Achieve 100% game completion and finish the game

SPEED_COMPLETION.name: Speed Completion
SPEED_COMPLETION.description: Achieve 100% game completion and finish the game in under 20 hours

STEELSOUL.name: Steel Soul
STEELSOUL.description: Finish the game in Steel Soul mode

STEELSOUL_COMPLETION.name: Steel Heart
STEELSOUL_COMPLETION.description: Achieve 100% game completion and finish the game in Steel Soul mode

HUNTER_1.name: Keen Hunter
HUNTER_1.description: Record all of Hallownest's creatures in the Hunter's Journal

MR_MUSHROOM.name: Passing of the Age
MR_MUSHROOM.description: Aid the Herald in moving on

NIGHTMARE_GRIMM.name: Ritual
NIGHTMARE_GRIMM.description: Defeat the Nightmare King and complete the Ritual

BANISHMENT.name: Banishment
BANISHMENT.description: Banish the Grimm Troupe from Hallownest

PANTHEON1.name: Brotherhood
PANTHEON1.description: Complete the Pantheon of the Master

PANTHEON2.name: Inspiration
PANTHEON2.description: Complete the Pantheon of the Painter

PANTHEON3.name: Focus
PANTHEON3.description: Complete the Pantheon of the Sage

PANTHEON4.name: Soul & Shade
PANTHEON4.description: Complete the Pantheon of the Knight

ENDINGD.name: Embrace the Void
ENDINGD.description: Ascend the Pantheon of Hallownest and take your place at its peak

COMPLETIONGG.name: Pure Completion
COMPLETIONGG.description: Achieve 112% game completion and finish the game.

ACH_GP_EscapeAlienZoo.name: Broke the Code
ACH_GP_EscapeAlienZoo.description: You broke the Bounty Hunter code, and now you're a wanted outlaw. Good luck!

ACH_GP_KillKregButtons.name: Smash That Kreg Button
ACH_GP_KillKregButtons.description: Congratulations, you have murdered an animal rights activist.

ACH_GP_KillMuppyDoo.name: Invasive Procedure
ACH_GP_KillMuppyDoo.description: You assassinated a Senator and almost killed yourself in the process.

ACH_GP_KillBlueWizard.name: Thats A Wrap on Character Actor Fred Melamed
ACH_GP_KillBlueWizard.description: Great job voicing the Blue Wizard, Fred! We loved you in "A Serious Man"!

ACH_GP_KillGwendolyn.name: Dad's All, Folks
ACH_GP_KillGwendolyn.description: You saved your dad but left a raging monster loose in Wyoming. Let's just call it a win!

ACH_GP_KillBerkel.name: So Long, and Thanks For All The Ghosts
ACH_GP_KillBerkel.description: Don't feel bad for killing a dolphin. They've done some horrible things. For real. Look it up.

ACH_GP_KillNipulon.name: Trial of the Century
ACH_GP_KillNipulon.description: Nice, you saved humanity again! Thankfully there are no evil pharmaceutical companies in real life.

ACH_GP_FoundEroticWorms.name: Romanced All 34 Erotic Worm Monsters
ACH_GP_FoundEroticWorms.description: This one takes over 100 hours. Only the most dedicated worm romancers get this one. Great job!

ACH_GP_DrewAWiener.name: Was That A Wiener?
ACH_GP_DrewAWiener.description: We can't actually tell if you drew a wiener. But if you did, this was probably a little funny.

ACH_BountyHunterExhibit.name: Bountilogical Studies PhD
ACH_BountyHunterExhibit.description: Visit every exhibit at the Bounty Hunter Museum.

ACH_MuseumLaserMaze.name: Dunston Has Checked In
ACH_MuseumLaserMaze.description: Navigate the laser maze with perfect precision to help a new friend.

ACH_BurnKregsClothes.name: Witness the Burning Bush
ACH_BurnKregsClothes.description: This must be what Moses saw when he, too, burned off Kreg Button's pants.

ACH_MurderMysterySolved.name: Columbo in Space
ACH_MurderMysterySolved.description: You perfectly solved the murder mystery. You got every detail just right. You didn't cheat, right?

ACH_ApplesVases.name: All Your Vase Are Belong to Us
ACH_ApplesVases.description: Break all of Apples' vases. He just can't have nice things, court order.

ACH_WizardQuiz.name: Why do you know all that stuff?
ACH_WizardQuiz.description: Prove your Galactic Tax Code prowess.

ACH_DopeFishTank.name: Tanks for the Memories
ACH_DopeFishTank.description: Fill up the aquarium in Quarters.

ACH_FindEmulatedGames.name: Throne of Games
ACH_FindEmulatedGames.description: Find the games in the game.

ACH_SlashAllWantedPosters.name: Unwanted
ACH_SlashAllWantedPosters.description: Slash all of your Wanted Posters.

ACH_CompleteSkateRaces.name: Phony Hawk
ACH_CompleteSkateRaces.description: Complete three races in each of the three hubs.

ReachHub4.name: On the edge of the World

KilledBySpider.name: Too many legs, too many eyes
KilledBySpider.description: Get eaten by a spider in an exploration / traversal mission (requires spiders to be enabled)

ClimbOnMantis.name: Titan-hike
ClimbOnMantis.description: Climb on a mantis for at least 5 seconds

WinH2M5.name: If not above, then below
WinH2M5.description: Win "Stockpiling" after building and using the "Burrow" power 3 times or more

CompleteStrategicWithUnit.name: No ant left behind
CompleteStrategicWithUnit.description: Win a strategic mission without losing a single legion

Drown.name: Despite millions of years of evolution...

WinH2M2.name: The perfect ally
WinH2M2.description: Win "Flanking" without capturing any nest yourself but you can take the headquarters

WinH2M0.name: 6 legs moving fast
WinH2M0.description: Complete "The flood" in less than 5 minutes

HaveSameUnits.name: MOOOORE!
HaveSameUnits.description: Have 5 legions of the same type in a strategic mission

TerminalVelocity.name: Terminal Velocity
TerminalVelocity.description: Find one of the highest points and jump from it to reach maximum falling speed

WinH2M6RidingSnail.name: Slowly but always forward
WinH2M6RidingSnail.description: Win "Snailing out of here" while riding the snail for 80% of the time

WinH4M6.name: You shall not pass
WinH4M6.description: Win "A city under attack" without any defenses (destroy them in the first 3 minutes)

WinH2M4.name: See all but stay unseen
WinH2M4.description: Win "Behind enemy lines" without taking any damage from enemy patrols

WinStrategicWithoutDamage.name: Catch me if you can
WinStrategicWithoutDamage.description: Win a strategic mission without taking any damage yourself

FlyTheButterfly.name: A tired prey is an easy prey

WalkOnAQueen.name: This is just rude
WalkOnAQueen.description: Interrupt a queen by walking out while having a conversation

ScarePillbugs.name: Keep rollin', rollin', rollin', rollin'
ScarePillbugs.description: Scare 5 pillbugs to have them roll over

FindACollectible.name: Gotta catch 'em all!
FindACollectible.description: Unlock your first entry in the collection

CompleteTactical.name: Against a stronger enemy, defy his logic

CompleteStrategic.name: Accept victory: none can withstand you

WinH4M3.name: King of the hill
WinH4M3.description: Win "Battle of the pinecones" after taking the "Hill nest" as your first nest taken
